---
title: "GEOS 500 - Final Proposal Draft"
author: "Ted Scott"
format: pdf
editor: visual
bibliography: [references.bib, citationExport-bams-d-18-0268.1.xml.bib]
---

## Methane emission from freshwater wetlands: complete data sets, the impact of water chemistry, and the response to a warming climate

A PhD Research Proposal, by

## Ted Scott

Department of Geography

University of British Columbia, Vancouver

December, 2023

### Introduction
